name: Local Privilege Escalation via Windows Rollback Deletion
description: Adversaries may establish persistence and elevate privileges by using an installer to trigger the execution of malicious content during system uninstallation on backup directiry C:/Config.msi.

filterSets.name: Suspicious Rollback Configuration Deletion via Command Line
Suspicious Rollback Configuration Deletion via Powershell

author: Abdelrahman Esmail
